_comment: Static real-player pool for the UI-test fixture seeder (backend/tests/fixtures/seed_ui_test_db.py). Generated 2026-07-11 by intersecting data/.sleeper_players_cache.json with the DynastyProcess values-players.csv (2026-07-10 scrape): only Active QB/RB/WR/TE with value>0 in BOTH scoring formats, top-N per position by value_1qb (QB 55 / RB 100 / WR 120 / TE 65 = 340 — sized so a 12-team x 26-man league fits with spare free agents). Real names/ids are REQUIRED: the runtime universal pool (server.build_universal_pool) drops any player whose name has no live DynastyProcess value, so invented names would silently break replayed rankings and unlock state. dp_value_* fields are seeder-side Elo seeds only; the backend never reads them. Refresh by re-running the intersection if DP drops players (seed_ui_test_db.py docstring has the recipe).
